Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION

Title: Provides a tax exemption on certain auxiliary dwelling units constructed for seniors or disabled individuals
Summary: Allows a real property tax exemption for dwelling units constructed for senior citizens or disabled persons receiving social security disability benefits.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property tax law, in relation to providing a tax exemption on certain auxiliary dwelling units constructed for seniors or disabled individuals
